creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
It is still an issue (see below for a list of ports that use COMPILER_TYPE.  

COMPILER_TYPE should be removed, and ports should only depend on CHOSEN_COMPILER_TYPE (or a few renames to make things sensible).  

# find . -name Makefile | xargs grep COMPILER_TYPE | grep -v CHOSEN_COMPILER_TYPE | cut -f 1 -d : | sort -u | xargs -n1 -I % sh -c "if ! grep -q '\(compiler[^:]\|compiler:feature\)' % ; then echo % ; fi"
